mapper.update:
update emp_leave_record
user_id = #{user_id},
create_time = #{createTime},
leave_start_time = #{leaveStartTime},
leave_end_time = #{leaveEndTime},
leave_reason = #{leaveReason},
leave_type_code = #{leaveTypeCode},
approve_user_id = #{approve_user_id},
approve_time = #{approveTime},
approve_content = #{approveContent},
status = #{status},
real_end_time = #{realEndTime},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emp_leave_record WHERE status = 1
